bids.reasoning: At the opening with no opponent offers or messages yet, I am targeting my maximum utility bid. Since there is no time pressure at t=0.0, I should start firm on my preferred values across all issues and wait for the opponent’s response.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a very high-utility bid while making a small concession to avoid simply repeating my opening offer. The opponent’s only offer was all valueA, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and does not yet show meaningful concession, so I will hold firm especially on the high-weight issues D and E.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still very early at t=0.04, and the opponent has only made a small concession from all valueA to issueE:valueB. Their offers are improving slightly for me but remain far below my prior offers, so I will concede only on low-weight issues while holding firm on the important issueD and issueE.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early at t=0.06 and the opponent’s offers remain extremely unfavorable to me with no reliable concession trend. I will make a small tradeoff on low-weight issueA while holding firm on the important issues C, D, and E, and avoid repeating my exact previous bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.94 because it is still very early in the negotiation and the opponent’s offers remain extremely low for me, only briefly improving issueE from valueA to valueB. Since the opponent appears to prefer lower values across all issues, I am conceding mainly on lower-weight issues issueA and issueB while holding firm on the most important issues issueC, issueD, and issueE.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early in the negotiation and the opponent has only made minimal concessions, with their best offer to me reaching about 0.26. I will concede mainly on my lowest-weight issues, issueA and issueB, while holding firm on the more important issueC, issueD, and issueE.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.90 because it is still very early at t=0.12 and the opponent has shown only minimal concession, with their offers to me staying near 0.20–0.26 utility. I will concede a bit more on the low-weight issues issueA/issueB while holding issueC, issueD, and issueE at my best values since those drive most of my utility.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.90 because it is still very early at t=0.14 and the opponent has not made meaningful concessions beyond occasionally moving issueE to valueB. Their offers remain very low for me, so I will concede mainly on lower-weight issues A and B while holding firm on the important issues C, D, and E.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.88 because it is still early at t=0.16, so I should concede mainly on my lowest-weight issues while protecting issueC, issueD, and issueE. The opponent has remained extremely firm with mostly valueA bids and only minor movement on issueE to valueB, so I do not yet see enough reciprocal concession to justify lowering my high-importance issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.18, so I should not concede on my most important issues D and E or the moderately important issue C yet. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me, only occasionally improving issueE to valueB, so I read them as largely holding firm; I will concede further on low-weight issueA while keeping the main value concentrated in issueC/issueD/issueE.

I targeted a utility around 0.82, conceding further only on the low-weight issues A and B while preserving the high-weight issues C, D, and E at my best value. Time is still early at t=0.20, and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me with only occasional movement on issueE, so there is no reason to make major concessions yet.

I am targeting about 0.80 utility: I have already conceded fully on the two lowest-weight issues, and at t=0.22 it is reasonable to make only a modest additional concession. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and show little real movement, only occasionally improving issueE to valueB, so I will continue holding firm on my highest-weight issues issueD and issueE while conceding issueC slightly.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 by conceding further on the lower/mid-weight issues while holding firm on the two most important issues, issueD and issueE. At t=0.24 there is time left, and the opponent has barely conceded, alternating mostly between all valueA and only a small move on issueE, so I should not drop too far yet.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.72 by conceding further on the lower/mid-weight issueC while holding firm on the most important issues D and E. At t=0.26 there is time pressure to show movement, but the opponent’s offers remain very low for me and only minimally concede on issueE, so I should not yet drop near their signaled bids.

I am targeting a utility around 0.68 by conceding further on issueC while preserving my highest-weight issues, issueD and issueE, at valueE. At t=0.28 there is still time, and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me with only occasional movement on issueE, so I should not concede on the most important issues yet. I am avoiding an exact repeat of my prior bid and continuing concessions first on lower-to-mid weight issues.

I am targeting a utility around 0.62, continuing the concession path without giving up too much this early-mid stage at t=0.30. The opponent has mostly held at very low-value offers for me, with only occasional movement on issueE, so I will keep issueE strong and make the next concession on issueD while not repeating my previous bid.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.56, continuing a controlled concession path while preserving issueE, one of my highest-weight issues. The opponent has not meaningfully conceded beyond occasionally offering valueB on issueE, so at t=0.32 I should not drop close to their very low offers yet, but I will avoid repeating my prior bid by conceding further on issueD.

I targeted a utility of about 0.50, continuing a gradual concession path while preserving issueE, one of my highest-weight issues, at its best value. At t=0.34 there is still time, but the opponent has shown very little movement, only occasionally improving issueE to valueB, so I am conceding on issueD next without accepting their very low offers.

I am targeting a still-positive utility around 0.44 by conceding all lower and mid issues while holding issueE, one of my highest-weight issues, at my best value. At t=0.36 there is time left, but the opponent has barely conceded and repeatedly offers only valueA except occasional valueB on issueE, so I am making a clear concession without collapsing to their bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.38 by making a limited concession on the high-weight issueE while keeping the rest aligned with the opponent’s repeated demands. The opponent has been holding very firm, mostly offering all valueA with only occasional issueE: valueB, so at t=0.38 I should concede some but not drop all the way to their low-utility bids yet.

I am targeting a utility around 0.32 by keeping the high-weight issueE above the opponent’s valueA while already conceding fully on the other issues. At t=0.40 there is some time left, but the opponent has barely conceded and mostly repeats very low-utility bids for me, so I will make a moderate additional concession from my prior issueE:valueD offer to issueE:valueC without dropping to their best signaled issueE:valueB yet.

I targeted a modest utility around 0.32 rather than dropping immediately to the opponent’s repeated 0.26 offer, since we are still before the late phase at t=0.42. The opponent has barely conceded and has repeatedly offered issueE: valueB while holding other issues at valueA, so I concede issueE to their signaled level while testing a small gain on high-weight issueD.

I am targeting a modest utility around 0.30, since we are in the mid-game and the opponent has mostly held firm at very low-utility offers for me, only occasionally conceding issueE to valueB. To avoid repeating my previous bid while still moving closer to the opponent’s signaled range, I keep issueE at their recurring valueB and ask for only a small improvement on issueC rather than on the highest-weight issues D/E.

I targeted a modest utility around 0.32, since we are near the midpoint but not yet at the deadline, so I should not concede all the way to the opponent’s very low offers. The opponent has held firm on issueA-D at valueA and only sometimes concedes issueE to valueB, so I am matching their signaled issueE=valueB while asking for a small improvement on high-weight issueD.

I am targeting a modest utility around 0.30, since we are near mid-negotiation and the opponent has only slightly improved their offers to me, mostly by moving issueE from valueA to valueB. I will continue conceding on lower/mid issues while keeping one small gain beyond their recurring offer, avoiding an exact repeat of my previous bid.

I targeted a modest utility around 0.30, since we are at mid-negotiation and the opponent has been very firm, only repeatedly offering valueB on issueE while keeping all other issues at valueA. I am conceding mostly on the lower-weight issues and keeping just one small improvement over their latest offer to avoid immediately dropping to their exact bid before the late stage.

I targeted a modest utility around 0.30, since we are just past mid-negotiation and the opponent has been almost completely firm, only consistently allowing issueE at valueB. Their offers show no real concession on issueA-D, so I am mostly matching their signaled position while preserving a small gain on one lower-to-mid issue rather than dropping immediately to their exact bid.

At t=0.54 the opponent has held nearly firm, repeatedly offering issueA/B/C/D at valueA with issueE usually at valueB, worth 0.26 to me. Since my recent slightly better bids around 0.28–0.30 have not been accepted and there are no messages changing that signal, I will match the opponent’s latest valid offer to maximize the chance of agreement while still staying above reservation value.
